description: Plugin-distributed hooks for incident-response-dfir. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 2 mechanically-detectable DFIR-hygiene smells — (1) an incident report/postmortem that names an individual as at-fault (blameless violation), (2) a runbook/IR-plan mentioning power off / shut down / reimage with no nearby memory/acquisition/evidence mention (preserve-evidence violation). Set DFIR_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
